name: [ SUPERHERO / COMIC RPG ]
description:
Be anyone in a comic-inspired universe!

"Honey, where's my super-suit?"

This isn't limited to Marvel, DC, or even Dark Horse, so you can play any character you want, including your own, in as many wild crossover configurations as you'd like, you supply the info, and we'll do the rest!

Feel free to invent your very own canon of heroes, antiheroes and villains, whether they're OCs, fusions of your favourites or just names you pulled out of a hat! From quirky highschoolers with bug bites to dark, gritty tales of beards, alcoholism and disturbingly tight spandex, the world (or worlds, if you're on a multiverse kick like a certain studio) is your oyster!

Please note, this bot, like all RPG bots, relies extremely heavily on user input! If it starts freaking out a little, or doesn't know how to handle all the characters you've namedropped, don't be afraid to treat it like a vending machine and give it a little *kick!*

Now, so I can get a shiny little participation badge, a little mood music.

(can you tell i just watched deadpool and wolverine?)

MAKE YOUR CHATS PUBLIC! IT HELPS ME IMPROVE THE BOT!
creator: slagcity
